FOOTER.DESC: An oasis of nature and passion for horses, located in the heart of Orosei, on the beautiful eastern coast of Sardinia.
FOOTER.DISCLAIMER: Translations are provided for convenience and may contain inaccuracies. We apologize for any errors.

ABOUT_SECTION.LABEL: About Us
ABOUT_SECTION.TITLE: Welcome to Centro Ippico Su Barone
ABOUT_SECTION.SUBTITLE: An oasis of nature and passion located in the heart of Orosei.
ABOUT_SECTION.DESC: For years we have been the reference point for those who want to live an authentic experience in contact with the pristine nature of Sardinia.

SERVICES_SECTION.LABEL: Services
SERVICES_SECTION.TITLE: Our Activities
SERVICES_SECTION.DESC: We offer unique experiences to let you discover the beauty of the Sardinian territory riding our splendid horses.

ABOUT.TITLE: About Us
ABOUT.HERO_SUB: Passion for horseback riding in Orosei

SECTION_1.TITLE: About us
SECTION_1.SUB: An oasis of nature and passion located in the heart of Orosei.
SECTION_1.CONTENT: Welcome to Centro Ippico Su Barone, an oasis of nature and passion for horses, located in the heart of Orosei, on the beautiful eastern coast of Sardinia. For years, our center has been the reference point for horseback riding enthusiasts and for those who wish to experience an authentic contact with the pristine nature of our island.

SECTION_2.TITLE: Our philosophy
SECTION_2.CONTENT: Our philosophy is based on respect for animals, love for the territory, and a warm welcome for every visitor. We offer equestrian activities designed with hospitality in mind, open to all ages and experience levels, both for those who want to get closer to the world of horses and for more experienced riders.

SECTION_3.TITLE: Activity and Passion
SECTION_3.SUB: Discover Orosei from a unique perspective.
SECTION_3.CONTENT: We offer horseback excursions along panoramic trails between sea, pine forests, and mountains, ideal for discovering the wild beauty of Orosei. Our riding school is dedicated to the training of beginners and the improvement of more experienced riders, with personalized lessons and qualified instructors. All our horses are carefully trained, respected, and accustomed to contact with adults and children.

WHY_US.TITLE: Why choose us
WHY_US.PASSION_DESC: We love our horses and our work.
WHY_US.LOCATION_DESC: We are in the heart of Orosei's nature.
WHY_US.FOR_ALL_DESC: Experiences suitable for all ages and levels.

SERVICES.TITLE: Our Services
SERVICES.ESCURSIONI_DESC: Discover the most authentic Sardinia with our horseback excursions in Orosei. We will cross pine forests, lagoons, and golden beaches.
SERVICES.SCUOLA_DESC: Centro Ippico Su Barone is also a renowned riding school in Orosei, ideal for adults and children.
SERVICES.NAVETTA_DESC: For an even more comfortable experience, we provide a shuttle service in Orosei directly from your accommodation.

ESCURSIONI_PAGE.TITLE: Horseback excursions
ESCURSIONI_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Explore Orosei in the saddle

BLOCK_1.TITLE: An Unforgettable Experience
BLOCK_1.SUBTITLE: Breathtaking scenery between sea and land
BLOCK_1.CONTENT: Discover the most authentic Sardinia with our horseback excursions in Orosei, by Centro Ippico Su Barone. Every outing is an unforgettable journey through breathtaking landscapes, trails immersed in the Mediterranean scrub, and spectacular views of the sea and mountains.

BLOCK_2.TITLE: Safety and Passion
BLOCK_2.SUBTITLE: Expert guide and maximum safety
BLOCK_2.CONTENT: Our excursions are designed for everyone: from beginners to experienced riders. Before departing, we offer a brief introduction to get familiar with the horse and ensure maximum safety during the ride.

BLOCK_3.TITLE: Suggestive Itineraries
BLOCK_3.SUBTITLE: Itineraries through pine forests and beaches
BLOCK_3.CONTENT: Accompanied by expert guides and reliable horses, you will travel through suggestive itineraries that cross pine forests, countryside, rivers, and pristine beaches, giving authentic emotions at every step.

BLOCK_4.TITLE: Magic at Sunset
BLOCK_4.SUBTITLE: A dreamlike atmosphere
BLOCK_4.CONTENT: We also organize sunset excursions, ideal for couples and groups, where the golden light of the sun setting on the horizon makes everything even more magical. Book your excursion now and let yourself be carried away on a journey of harmony with nature.

BLOCK_5.TITLE: The Awakening of Dawn
BLOCK_5.SUBTITLE: The thrill of the first light
BLOCK_5.CONTENT: The thrill of nature awakening in the saddle. Seeing the first sun rise over the sea of Orosei is an experience that touches the soul and remains impressed in the heart.

ESCURSIONI_PAGE.INFO: All excursions depart from Centro Ippico Su Barone at via Trucuris 34. Closed shoes and long pants are recommended. All excursions are accompanied by expert guides.
ESCURSIONI_PAGE.PROPOSALS_DESC: Choose the perfect excursion for you

ALBA.TITLE: Sunrise Excursion
ALBA.DESC: The thrill of nature awakening in the saddle.

MORNING_1H.TITLE: Morning Walk (1h)
MORNING_1H.DESC: Ideal to start the day with energy.

AFTERNOON_1H.TITLE: Afternoon Tour (1h)
AFTERNOON_1H.DESC: Relaxing walk in the late afternoon.

APERITIVO.TITLE: Aperitif Tour
APERITIVO.DESC: Includes aperitif at Stella di Mare Beach Bar.

NURAGHE.TITLE: Nuraghe Osalla Tour
NURAGHE.DESC: Includes aperitif and visit to the Nuraghe (for experts).

BLOCK_1.TITLE: Passion and Experience
BLOCK_1.SUBTITLE: Professionalism and fun
BLOCK_1.CONTENT: Centro Ippico Su Barone is also a renowned riding school in Orosei, ideal for adults and children who want to approach the world of horses in a safe and fun way. We offer individual and group lessons, personalized according to each student's experience level and goals.

BLOCK_2.TITLE: Our Courses
BLOCK_2.SUBTITLE: From technical basics to excellence
BLOCK_2.CONTENT: Our qualified instructors professionally and passionately guide the learning of equestrian techniques, from basics to refinement. Courses include: horse management from the ground, saddling, field exercises, and guided rides to apply what has been learned.

BLOCK_3.TITLE: Environment and Well-being
BLOCK_3.SUBTITLE: Ethics and animal welfare
BLOCK_3.CONTENT: Lessons take place in a safe and serene environment, with horses trained and accustomed to contact with children, making the experience pleasant and educational. We pay particular attention to animal welfare and the relationship between horse and rider, promoting an ethical and respectful approach.

BLOCK_4.TITLE: Confidence and Emotions
BLOCK_4.SUBTITLE: Developing confidence and character
BLOCK_4.CONTENT: Our school is the ideal place to learn to ride, develop self-confidence, and experience authentic emotions. We also organize themed days, summer camps, and educational activities.

BLOCK_5.TITLE: Your Point of Reference
BLOCK_5.SUBTITLE: Riding with awareness
BLOCK_5.CONTENT: Come and discover the passion for horseback riding at Centro Ippico Su Barone, the point of reference in Orosei for those who dream of riding with freedom and awareness.

NAVETTA_PAGE.TITLE: Shuttle Service
NAVETTA_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Travel without worries
NAVETTA_PAGE.DESC_1: Centro Ippico Su Barone wants to make your experience as pleasant as possible, eliminating the stress of transport.
NAVETTA_PAGE.DESC_2: Whether you are staying in a hotel, a tourist village, or a vacation home in the area, our driver will pick you up.

CONTACT_PAGE.TITLE: Contacts
CONTACT_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Get in touch
CONTACT_PAGE.DESC: We are at your disposal for any information, reservation or special request.

TESTIMONIALS.LABEL: Testimonials
TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: What they say about us
TESTIMONIALS.BADGE_DESC: The Trustindex verified badge is the Universal Symbol of Trust. Only the best companies can obtain the verified badge with a review score above 4.5, based on customer reviews from the last 12 months.
TESTIMONIALS.T1: Thanks to Stefano for the kindness and friendliness and also to his young staff and especially a special thanks to the docile and patient horses that always give beautiful emotions and experiences, and for having accompanied us to discover the beautiful oasis of Su Barone.
TESTIMONIALS.T2: How to start the morning with grit .... dawn on horseback and the sea a unique experience to try!!!! Fantastic !! Thanks Stefano!!!
TESTIMONIALS.T3: Beautiful excursion, horses well kept, highly recommended
TESTIMONIALS.T4: Horseback excursion at sunset along the pine forest and the beautiful beach, highly recommended even for beginners! Professional and prepared staff, very calm horses, also very convenient prices!
TESTIMONIALS.T5: The two-hour tour in the evening was wonderful. As an absolute beginner it was no problem for me. Everyone in the group was well taken care of. Simply perfect.
TESTIMONIALS.T6: We can only recommend it. It is a beautiful memory. Everyone was very friendly and you felt secure. The price is really fair. You don't need any previous knowledge.
TESTIMONIALS.T7: Superb hike, exceptional views, Stefano has the love of animals. I recommend 100%
TESTIMONIALS.T8: We had a very nice ride with Stefano and some other guests. Booking was very spontaneous the night before possible and uncomplicated and super friendly.
TESTIMONIALS.T9: We had a great time riding horses here! A small stable with super friendly owner and staff. They are very professional and love their island and their horses.

CTA.TITLE: For more information do not hesitate to contact us!
